Miscellaneous — what your contractors bill you
What to bill you — per contractor
Assign editors (optional — can differ from shooter)
Total paid out—
Shoot fees: 65% of shoot revenue. Misc (random shoots): $80/hr (video) or $40/hr (photo) to contractor. Drive reimbursed at $0.73/km excess beyond their 40km free zone. Editors: 35% of shoot revenue.

📅 Connect Google Calendar
Quick connect — sign in with Google
One click — DroneHub will ask for permission to read your Google Calendar and sync it automatically. No URL needed.
or link by ICS URL (for any team member)
Google Calendar → ⚙ Settings → [Your calendar] → Integrate calendar → copy Secret address in iCal format (ends in /basic.ics)
📅 Select calendars to sync
Choose which calendars to overlay on the DroneHub team calendar. Events from all selected calendars will appear in your colour.

Import Excel / CSV
Import contacts into which list?
Click to choose file or drag & drop
.xlsx, .xls, or .csv — duplicates by email are skipped
Recognised column names
Name: First Name, Last Name, Name  ·  Company: Company, Brokerage, Organisation  ·  Email: Email, E-mail  ·  Phone: Phone, Mobile, Cell  ·  City: City, Region, Location, Market
📋 Other — Business Type
Set default type for this upload:
If your file has a Type / Business Type column, each row will use that value. Rows without a type get the default above.
Recognised type column names: Type, Business Type, Type of Business, Industry, Category, Field, Sector, Job Type
Values like "Landscaping", "Construction Co.", "Restaurant / Bar" are auto-matched.

👋 Welcome! Let's get you set up.
This takes about 3 minutes. First, tell us about your company.

💡 Tip: Start with just what you need — you can always enable more in Settings.

Upload a CSV to auto-build your quote tool. Format: Service Name, Price, Description.

or skip — you can set up pricing in Settings later
